sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105737" key="tru/fac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρύφαξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n105737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a wanton, debauchee,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.95</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
